overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a drive through a futuristic city with elevated highways, transitioning from ground-level urban streets beneath overpasses to an elevated waterfront overlook. The scene features distinctive cyberpunk architecture including a red-striped industrial tower and the green Biotechnica building overlooking the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street beneath elevated highway interchange

events.description: passing a yellow taxi and black sedan in moderate traffic flow
approaching the base of the elevated highway ramp structure

agents.ego_description: driving forward through moderate traffic in an urban canyon beneath elevated highways

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving parallel to ego vehicle in adjacent lane
black sedan moving ahead in traffic under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure with green railings spanning overhead
tall industrial building with distinctive vertical red stripes and dark facade
cluster of modern glass and steel high-rise buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving through an urban canyon beneath massive elevated highway structures. The red-striped industrial tower dominates the right side while various vehicles navigate the multi-lane road. The space feels enclosed with limited sky visibility due to the overhead highway decks.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway ramp ascending to elevated roadway

events.description: executing a right turn onto the ascending highway ramp
emerging from under the main highway structure onto the elevated roadway

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn and ascending the curved highway ramp, merging with elevated traffic

notable_agents.action: red compact car merging from the left lane
tan sedan changing lanes ahead on the ramp

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars for the elevated highway structure
curved elevated highway ramp with green railings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right and ascends a curved highway ramp, passing massive concrete support pillars. The red-striped industrial tower shifts from right to left as the camera curves around, emerging from the shadow of the overhead structure into brighter light.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with billboard overpasses approaching waterfront

events.description: passing under a large billboard bridge spanning the highway
approaching the waterfront with view of distant bay and roller coaster opening up on the right

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway passing under billboard structures with increasing views of the distant waterfront

notable_agents.action: silver sports car overtaking on the right side
line of vehicles ahead approaching the billboard bridge

entered.detail: large highway overpass structure covered with multiple advertising billboards
amusement park roller coaster structure visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: Driving on the open elevated highway with full sky visibility, passing under a massive billboard-covered overpass. The red-striped tower recedes into the distance on the left while views of the distant waterfront and a roller coaster appear ahead. Traffic flows smoothly in multiple lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront overlook with view of bay and Biotechnica headquarters

events.description: vehicle comes to a stop at the elevated overlook revealing the Biotechnica building and waterfront
slow pan to the left showing more of the waterfront promenade and distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the waterfront from an elevated vantage point next to the Biotechnica building

entered.detail: distinctive green stacked modern building with the Biotechnica corporate logo visible
large body of water with distant shoreline and amusement park structures
wooden piers extending into the water along the shoreline
scattered palm trees along the waterfront promenade below

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at an elevated overlook revealing a stunning view of the waterfront bay. The distinctive green Biotechnica building dominates the right foreground while the camera slowly pans left to show the water, distant piers, palm trees along the promenade, and a roller coaster across the bay. The scene is calm and observational after the driving sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from the enclosed shadows of an urban canyon to a wide, sunlit waterfront overlook. It begins beneath massive elevated highway structures where a red-striped industrial tower looms over the multi-lane road, creating a sense of claustrophobia. As the vehicle turns right and ascends a curved ramp, the camera passes concrete support pillars and emerges from the overhead shadows into bright, open light. The scene then expands onto an elevated highway, passing under a billboard-covered overpass as the red-striped tower recedes and a distant roller coaster comes into view. Finally, the camera comes to a stop at a scenic overlook, panning from the prominent green Biotechnica building across the bay to reveal palm trees and distant piers under a clear sky.
